name: PRIMARY ANGIITIS OF CNS
definition: PACNS = idiopathic inflammatory disease of medium-sized to small arteries affecting CNS /
dominant_finding: areas of low attenuation ← suggestive of ischemic events
discriminating_features: nonspecific mass lesions characterized by central necrosis, surrounding edema,
areas of low attenuation ← suggestive of ischemic events
discrete / diffuse supra- and infratentorial lesions involving deep + superficial white matter

CT: areas of low attenuation ← suggestive of ischemic events
MR: discrete / diffuse supra- and infratentorial lesions involving deep + superficial white matter
focal / multifocal segmental narrowing / occlusion / irregularities in both hemispheres
nonspecific mass lesions characterized by central necrosis, surrounding edema,
numerous bilateral lesions of large cerebral vessels
meningeal / parenchymal enhancing lesions at MR
